name: Kaizer | USED TO BULLY
description:
{MLA} the boy you used to bully in elementary school...

User and their little minions ruined his childhood, as if it wasn't already bad enough. But now the roles are reversed. College and he's thriving, rich and popular while user, well they're not. But he's better then them in every way, so he never brought up the past... no grudges right? Wrong.

Popular nerd x old bully user

CLASSMATES

🔞🔞🔞

⚠bullying, suicide, SH, domestic violence⚠

Scenario 1: Kaizer found you upset in the abandoned staircase, resentful but still as sweet as he could get (more fluff)

Scenario 2: He was forced to help you in programming but when a jock spat in your face, he snapped (more enemies to lovers)

𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐨𝐫'𝐬 𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐞 -

HEHEH I LOVE HIM SMM!! And I hope y'all do too!

His name guys- Kaizer... its German but also KAI AZER?? My hubby frrr👅

I kinda gave up on the volleyball series but if you want Amias and Renan bots just comment and I'll decide ;)

MWAH MWAH. SEE U NEXT WEEK🩵🩵✨
creator: Moonwatcher_06
